title: AIR QUALITY, ASBESTOS, AND INDUSTRY EMISSION REGULATION - 211info
text: LANE REGIONAL AIR PROTECTION AGENCY AIR QUALITY, ASBESTOS, AND INDUSTRY EMISSION REGULATION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides air quality monitoring, asbestos regulation, and industry emission regulation, including home wood heating advisories. Also accepts, records, and investigates complaints related to air quality, asbestos, and industry emissions. 1010 Main Street Springfield, OR 97477 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-4pm Email (541) 736-1056 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 736-1056 Main phone Main phone (541) 736-1056 Alternate (541) 726-1930 Air Quality Complaint Line Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Lane County Services: Air Pollution Control Burning Bans Environmental Hazards Reporting Other Services Offered At This Location: PUBLIC HEALTH - HOME WOOD HEATING EXEMPTION If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. LANE REGIONAL AIR PROTECTION AGENCY
